languages.text: "Будем надеяться, что токсичная бурда, выдуманная красной мантией, сработает ровно так, как задумано. По мне, так эти хитрости излишни".

traits.locale_text: "Будем надеяться, что токсичная бурда, выдуманная красной мантией, сработает ровно так, как задумано. По мне, так эти хитрости излишни".

languages.text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."
languages.original_text: "Будем надеяться, что токсичная бурда, выдуманная красной мантией, сработает ровно так, как задумано. По мне, так эти хитрости излишни".

traits.locale_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."
"We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

languages.text: "Wir müssen nur hoffen, dass die toxische Brühe der Rotrobe wie geplant funktioniert. Zu viele Tricks, wenn Ihr mich fragt."
languages.original_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

traits.locale_text: "Wir müssen nur hoffen, dass die toxische Brühe der Rotrobe wie geplant funktioniert. Zu viele Tricks, wenn Ihr mich fragt."

languages.text: « Il ne reste plus qu'à espérer que la mixture toxique concoctée par les robes rouges ait l'effet escompté. Si vous voulez mon avis, tous ces subterfuges ne sont pas nécessaires. »
languages.original_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne reste plus qu'à espérer que la mixture toxique concoctée par les robes rouges ait l'effet escompté. Si vous voulez mon avis, tous ces subterfuges ne sont pas nécessaires. »

languages.text: «Tendremos que confiar en que el lodo tóxico del túnica roja funciona tal y como promete. En mi opinión, tanto truco es excesivo».
languages.original_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

traits.locale_text: «Tendremos que confiar en que el lodo tóxico del túnica roja funciona tal y como promete. En mi opinión, tanto truco es excesivo».

languages.text: "Kızıl cübbelinin hazırladığı zehirli bulamacın tam olarak planlandığı gibi işe yaramasını ummaktan başka çaremiz yok. Bana sorarsan bu numaralar çok fazla."
languages.original_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

traits.locale_text: "Kızıl cübbelinin hazırladığı zehirli bulamacın tam olarak planlandığı gibi işe yaramasını ummaktan başka çaremiz yok. Bana sorarsan bu numaralar çok fazla."

languages.text: “我们只能指望那个红袍子调制出来的有毒玩意儿真能按计划发挥作用了。依我看，这些花哨的计划实在太折腾了。”
languages.original_text: "We'll just have to hope that the toxic slop cooked up by the red robe works exactly as planned. If you ask me, all these tricks are too much."

traits.locale_text: “我们只能指望那个红袍子调制出来的有毒玩意儿真能按计划发挥作用了。依我看，这些花哨的计划实在太折腾了。”
